report.summary: Built a comprehensive Tokenized Treasuries & RWA Yield learn guide (1016 lines) and an interactive Funding Rate Tracker tool with cross-exchange comparison (644-line component + 302-line page), both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Tokenized U.S. Treasuries market reached $5.8B+ in March 2026, with total on-chain RWA exceeding $12B
Key players: BlackRock BUIDL (~$2B AUM), Circle USYC ($2.2B AUM, market leader), Ondo Finance USDY/OUSG ($1.4B+ combined), Franklin Templeton BENJI
Yields range 4.2%-5.5% APY depending on product, with minimum investments varying from $0 (USDY) to $100K+ (OUSG)
Stablecoin market cap at $311B provides the liquidity foundation for RWA tokenization
Perpetual futures funding rates: key sentiment indicator, with arbitrage strategies yielding 10-30% annualized during bullish periods
Major funding rate data providers: CoinGlass, CoinMarketCap, Glassnode, Loris Tools

sections.title: Content Created
items: Learn guide: Tokenized Treasuries & RWA Yield Guide 2026 — 3200+ words covering what tokenized treasuries are, why they matter, top products compared (BUIDL, USYC, USDY, OUSG, BENJI), how they work, risks, how to buy, comparison with traditional bonds/stablecoins, and 6-question FAQ
Tool page: Crypto Funding Rate Tracker — full page with JSON-LD structured data (SoftwareApplication + FAQPage schemas), how-it-works section, 6-question FAQ, and interactive component

Interactive component: FundingRateTracker.tsx — 644-line client component with search/filter, sort, expandable exchange breakdown, summary stats, color-coded rates, and mock data for 10 tokens across 6 exchanges

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Learn page title: Tokenized Treasuries Guide 2026: RWA Yield, BUIDL, USDY & More | degen0x
Tool page title: Crypto Funding Rate Tracker - Compare Perp Rates Across Exchanges | degen0x
Tool page target keywords: funding rate tracker, perpetual futures funding, crypto funding rates, funding rate arbitrage
Structured data: SoftwareApplication + FAQPage schemas via combineSchemas on tool page
Internal linking on learn page to /learn/staking-guide, /tools/dca-calculator, /learn/defi-yield-farming-guide, /learn/stablecoins-guide
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
